question: List all book titles which have the lowest sale price .
sql: SELECT Title FROM Book WHERE SalePrice = (SELECT MIN(SalePrice) FROM Book)

back_translation.intent: 查询最低售价的书籍标题

semantic.reason: 两者语义完全一致。原始问题要求列出所有最低售价的书籍标题，SQL通过SalePrice = (SELECT MIN(SalePrice) FROM Book)准确实现了该逻辑，正确筛选出具有最低售价的书籍标题，且未涉及聚合、分组、排序等额外操作。
